scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const srv='dist/server'; const out='.output/server'; fs.rmSync(out,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true}); for(const e of fs.readdirSync(srv)){const s=path.join(srv,e); const d=path.join(out,e); if(fs.statSync(s).isDirectory()){fs.cpSync(s,path.join(out,e),{recursive:true})}else{fs.copyFileSync(s,d)}} fs.renameSync(path.join(out,'server.js'),path.join(out,'index.mjs')); for(const f of fs.readdirSync(path.join(out,'assets'))){const fp=path.join(out,'assets',f); if(f.endsWith('.js')){let c=fs.readFileSync(fp,'utf8'); if(c.includes('../server.js')){c=c.replaceAll('../server.js','../index.mjs'); fs.writeFileSync(fp,c)}}} let idx=fs.readFileSync(path.join(out,'index.mjs'),'utf8'); idx=idx.replace(/\n  db as d,/g,'\n'); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(out,'index.mjs'),idx); console.log('copied -> .output/server')"
